'''nathaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycetocyte|mycetocyte]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycetocyte|mycetocyte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nathaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næthægæth|næthægæth]] || [[word:næthægæj|næthægæj]] || [[word:næthægæsh|næthægæsh]] || [[word:næthægæ|næthægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nathathagath|nathathagath]] || [[word:nathathagaj|nathathagaj]] || [[word:nathathagash|nathathagash]] || [[word:nathathaga|nathathaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nathagath|nathagath]] || [[word:nathagaj|nathagaj]] || [[word:nathagash|nathagash]] || [[word:nathaga|nathaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nathafgath|nathafgath]] || [[word:nathafgaj|nathafgaj]] || [[word:nathafgash|nathafgash]] || [[word:nathafgaf|nathafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nathagatha|nathagatha]] || [[word:nathagaja|nathagaja]] || [[word:nathagasha|nathagasha]] || [[word:nathagaka|nathagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nathagath|nathagath]] || [[word:nathagaj|nathagaj]] || [[word:nathagash|nathagash]] || [[word:nathaga|nathaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nathagathal|nathagathal]] || [[word:nathagajal|nathagajal]] || [[word:nathagashal|nathagashal]] || [[word:nathagakal|nathagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nathagathatha|nathagathatha]] || [[word:nathagajaja|nathagajaja]] || [[word:nathagashasha|nathagashasha]] || [[word:nathagaka|nathagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nathagathan|nathagathan]] || [[word:nathagajan|nathagajan]] || [[word:nathagashan|nathagashan]] || [[word:nathagakan|nathagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nathagathaoro|nathagathaoro]] || [[word:nathagajaoro|nathagajaoro]] || [[word:nathagashaoro|nathagashaoro]] || [[word:nathagakaoro|nathagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
